title: AuraBoot plugin page import envelope (DSL v4)
description: Declarative structural gate for plugin config/pages.json page envelopes at import time. Block-level contracts (column/field/label rules) are validated by PageSchemaValidator, not this schema; additional top-level fields (pageKey, modelCode, title, extension, profile, ...) are allowed.

schemaVersion.description: Pages must declare the current v4 page format.

kind.description: Only the three production-renderable page kinds are importable as plugin pages.

type.description: v4 page layout is either a 12-column grid or a vertical stack.

blocks.description: A page must declare at least one block.
